title: A Toca da Coruja
description: Venha pra Toca da Coruja, um modpack que combina Cobblemon, Farmer's Delight, Supplementaries, e vários mods que melhoram a experiência Vanilla do Minecraft - Batalhe com treinadores, Mega evolua seu Pokémon, e muito mais!
body:
![title-banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3d9c041903817f180ed7d9b4ae986e16ea4641.png)
![black-bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d0d628fbc661dfaca3a232d83c90e7dafaf94dc_0.webp)
![bem-vindo-banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7e071ad14c897c44bdbafe36a6db71d78225f76_0.webp)

Prepare-se para a aventura definitiva de Minecraft + Pokémon! 🗺️✨

A Toca da Coruja mistura exploração, batalhas, construção e qualidade de vida — com um visual e performance excelentes pra jogar. 🎒🔥

🚀 Destaques do modpack:

💠 Cobblemon + Mega Showdown: capture, treine e batalhe com centenas de Pokémons em um sistema completo com treinadores da Hack ROM Radical Red e Mega Evoluções atualizadas até o Legends: ZA ⚔️.

🌍 Mundo épico: Terralith + Tectonic + Distant Horizons pra biomas lindos e vistas insanas.

🧭 Navegação: Xaero’s Minimap + World Map pra explorar sem se perder.

🍲 Comida & sobrevivência: Farmer’s Delight pra receitas e progressão mais divertida.

🏡 Construção & decoração: Supplementaries + Amendments pra bases muito mais vivas.

⚡ Performance & QoL: Sodium + Iris + Lithium e várias melhorias de interface (JEI, tooltips, inventário).

🌟 Se você quer explorar, construir uma base absurda e virar o maior treinador do servidor… esse pack é pra você.

📣 Dúvidas/feedback: @mottameister 🎮💬

🎢 Aproveite pra checar a nossa campanha personalizada com a Lore do servidor!! Batalhas em duplas, competitivas, 26 trainers personalizados! - https://modrinth.com/mod/owls-nest-rct-campaign 🦉

![black-bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d0d628fbc661dfaca3a232d83c90e7dafaf94dc_0.webp)
![welcome-banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52a3159ae26bdd9d8937e11b35554accbb50ca40_0.webp)

Get ready for the ultimate Minecraft + creature-catching adventure! 🗺️✨

The Owl's Nest blends exploration, battles, building, and quality-of-life improvements — with visuals and performance that make it way more enjoyable to play. 🎒🔥

🚀 Modpack highlights:

💠 Cobblemon + Mega Showdown: catch, train, and battle with hundreds of Pokémon in a full-featured system, featuring trainers inspired by the Radical Red hack ROM and Mega Evolutions updated all the way to Legends: ZA ⚔️.

🌍 Epic worldgen: Terralith + Tectonic + Distant Horizons for gorgeous biomes and insane views.

🧭 Navigation: Xaero’s Minimap + World Map so you can explore without getting lost.

🍲 Food & survival: Farmer’s Delight for better recipes and a more fun progression.

🏡 Building & decoration: Supplementaries + Amendments to make your bases feel alive.

⚡ Performance & QoL: Sodium + Iris + Lithium, plus tons of interface improvements (JEI, tooltips, inventory).

🌟 If you want to explore, build an insane base, and become the top trainer on the server… this pack is for you.

📣 Questions/feedback: @mottameister 🎮💬
![black-bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d0d628fbc661dfaca3a232d83c90e7dafaf94dc_0.webp)
